notes: Snake Boss added as 4th SOON placeholder (serpent body, head-only weak point, venom trails). First-clear rewards: clearing a (boss × difficulty) combo for the first time grants bonus XP + Pulse + keys (Easy +200/80/1 → Brutal +1200/300/4). Granted once per combo, persisted locally. Results overlay shows FIRST CLEAR · BONUS REWARD chip when applicable. Global cross-player leaderboards coming in v0.7.0.
